ogTitle: Calico Creek vs Calingunee: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Calico Creek and Calingunee.
heading: Calico Creek vs Calingunee — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Calico Creek, Queensland and Calingunee, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Calingunee has a lower overall climate risk score (28/100) compared to Calico Creek (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Calico Creek or Calingunee safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Calico Creek has a flood risk score of 59/100, while Calingunee scores 26/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Calico Creek scores 24/100 for bushfire risk. Calingunee scores 37/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Calico Creek or Calingunee?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Calingunee has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.98% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
